narrative:
Olmsted Falls-04-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 979 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.2 percentage points.
